title: Transcriptional profiling of single colon cancer cell CT26
author: Jayakumar Vadakekolathu
content: E-MEXP-3054 Transcriptional profiling of single colon cancer cell CT26 transcription profiling by array EFO EFO_0002768 Mus musculus Technological advances in transcriptional profiling and in the availability of the single-cell sampling from rare and specialised cell types have come together
